description.from: [Fire Ball] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.
description.to: [Fireball] Reduces Mana Cost by 1000 and increases DMG by {0}%.

description.from: [Fire Rain] Increases DMG by 20%. Upon Critical Hit on an enemy with 5 or more stacks of Ember, Cooldown will be reduced by 5%. Upon killing an enemy with this Skill, Cooldown will be reduced by an additional 20%.
description.to: [Fire Rain] Increases DMG by 20%. Upon Critical Hit on an enemy with 5 or more stacks of Ember, Cooldown will be reduced by {0}%. Upon killing an enemy with this Skill, Cooldown will be reduced by an additional 5%.

description.from: [Flame Diffusion] Ember becomes irremovable and causes the target to take {0}% increased M.DMG per stack.
description.to: [Flame Diffusion] Changes Ember max stacks to 14 and increases Ember DMG by {0}%.

description.from: Critical Rate increases by {0}, Critial DMG increase by {1}, and Skill Attacks deal additional Magic DMG equal to {2}% of ATK per [Ember] stack on the target.
description.to: Critical Rate increases by {0}, Critical DMG increases by {1}, and Skill Attacks deal additional DMG equal to {2}% per [Ember] stack on the target.
